# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")

# 游戏开发工作流

# AI 资产生成

# Unity 专家

```

```text
generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene

generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
```

<think>I now have a comprehensive picture of the entire HomeBase module and the related systems. Let me compile a thorough analysis of what exists and what's missing for building a "My Time at Portia" style free building and placement system.</think>I now have a complete picture of the entire codebase. Here is my thorough analysis:

---

## Complete HomeBase Module Analysis

### 1. Architecture Overview

**Namespace**: `Sttop5.Modules.HomeBase`  
**Scene**: `Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/Scenes/HomeScene.scene`  
**Module Pattern**: Inherits from `GameModule` (abstract base in `_Shared/Core/GameModule.cs`), registered with `ModuleManager` for lifecycle management.

The HomeBase module is a **beginnings-only skeleton** — it has a solid foundation of class hierarchy, save/load, and core loops, but is **missing almost every feature needed for "My Time at Portia" free-style building and placement.**

---

### 2. Existing Code — What IS Built

#### Files Found (10 .cs files, all read in full):

| File | What it does |
|------|-------------|
| `BuildingBase.cs` | **Base class** for all buildings. Manages level, upgrade (gold cost check via `PlayerProfile`), demolish (60% refund), initialization, and save restoration. Calls virtual `BuildingUpdate()` in `Update()`. Has a two-frame delayed `_isPlaced` auto-set. |
| `BuildingData.cs` | **ScriptableObject** defining buildings. Fields: `buildingId`, `buildingName`, `description`, `BuildingType` enum, `icon`, `prefab`, `gridSize` (Vector2Int), `levels[]` (upgradeCost, buildCost, productionRate, productionCapacity, storageCapacity), portal target info, producedResource. |
| `BuildingManager.cs` | **Central building registry**. Has: `PlaceBuilding()` (instantiates prefab or creates placeholder, deducts gold), `RemoveBuilding()`, `GetBuildingNear()`, `ExportSaveData()`, `RestoreFromSaveData()`. Holds a `List<BuildingBase>` and a `_availableBuildings[]` array. |
| `PortalBuilding.cs` | **Portal subclass** — pulses scale/color, has `OnPortalClicked()` that calls `SceneManager.LoadScene()`, uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection. |
| `PortalEffectController.cs` | Simple light pulsing effect for portal buildings. |
| `HomeManager.cs` | **Module controller**. Extends `GameModule`. Initializes home, places starter buildings, handles save/load via `HomeSaveData`, implements `GetModuleSaveData()` / `RestoreModuleSaveData()`, saves on pause/quit. |
| `ResourceBuilding.cs` | **Resource production subclass**. `BuildingUpdate()` accumulates production based on `productionRate`/`productionCapacity`. `CollectResources()` adds Gold or Diamond to `PlayerProfile`. Has offline earnings calculation. |
| `ResourceManager.cs` | **Local resource manager** (Wood/Stone/Food). Has add/spend methods, `CollectAllResources()` (iterates all buildings), save/load via `HomeSaveData`. |
| `ResourceType.cs` | Enum: `Gold, Diamond, Wood, Stone, Food` |
| `HomeMainUI.cs` | **UI controller**. Displays Gold, Diamond, Level, Wood, Stone, Food. Has Collect All button, Build Menu toggle, Back button. Subscribes to `PlayerProfile` events. |

#### Existing ScriptableObject Assets (5 found):
- `GoldMine.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Gold, 3 levels (costs 100/200/500 gold to upgrade), gridSize (2,2)
- `LumberMill.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Wood, 3 levels, gridSize (2,2)
- `Quarry.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Fountain.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Portal_TowerDefense.asset` — BuildingType.Portal, targets "towerdefense" module → "MainMenu" scene, 1 level, gridSize (2,3)
- `Portal_Match3.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)

#### Save System:
- `HomeSaveData` class in `BuildingManager.cs` — serializes wood/stone/food counts + list of `BuildingSaveEntry` (buildingId, posX, posY, level)
- Save/load flows through `HomeManager` → `SaveSystem` (shared singleton that reads/writes JSON to `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/gamesave.json`)
- `GameSaveData` supports module-scoped save entries (ModuleSaveEntry list)

#### Shared Systems Available:
- `EventBus` / `GlobalEventBus` — typed event pub/sub
- `PlayerProfile` — singleton for Gold/Diamond/Level/Exp/Stamina
- `ModuleManager` — scene-loading-based module activation/deactivation
- `SceneLoader` — additive scene loading/unloading
- `Singleton<T>` — base singleton pattern (DontDestroyOnLoad)

---

### 3. What's MISSING for a "My Time at Portia" Free Building & Placement System

This is the critical part. The existing system is **slot/click-then-instantiate** — nothing like free-form placement:

#### ❌ **No Grid System**
- `BuildingData` has a `gridSize` field (Vector2Int), but **there is no Grid class, no GridManager, no snap-to-grid logic, no grid visualization** anywhere.
- `BuildingManager.PlaceBuilding()` just takes a raw worldPos — no snapping.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot.cs` uses pre-placed collider slots (mouse click + raycast), not a grid.

#### ❌ **No Drag-and-Drop / Ghost Preview**
- No prefab ghost/cursor following the mouse during placement.
- No rotation preview, no placement validation feedback (green/red indicator), no area-of-effect range preview.
- No `IDragHandler` / `IBeginDragHandler` / `IEndDragHandler` anywhere in the system.
- The `TowerPlacementTest.cs` (TD module) is the closest thing — it uses `Input.GetMouseButtonDown(0)` + `Physics2D.Raycast` to detect click on a collider, then calls `slot.PlaceTower()`. This is **not free placement**.

#### ❌ **No Placement Validation**
- No collision detection against other buildings.
- No terrain/boundary checking.
- No overlap prevention.
- No height/slope checks.
- No minimum-distance-from-other-buildings enforcement.

#### ❌ **No Build Menu with Drag-to-Place**
- `HomeMainUI` has a `_buildMenuPanel` toggle and calls `_homeManager?.OnCollectAllClicked()`.
- There is a `BuildButtonManager` in the TD module that spawns UI buttons at world-to-screen positions — but this is for clicking pre-existing slots, not for selecting from a build menu and then placing.
- No build-mode state machine (e.g., idle → placing → confirming → idle).

#### ❌ **No Free Rotation**
- No rotation input handling, no 45/90-degree snapping.
- `BuildingData` has no rotation-related fields.

#### ❌ **No Multi-Tile / Multi-Cell Occupancy System**
- `gridSize` exists on `BuildingData` but is never used in any logic.
- No system to track which cells are occupied.

#### ❌ **No Move/Relocate Building**
- No drag-to-move existing buildings.
- No "pick up and reposition" mechanic.

#### ❌ **No Crafting / Recipe System**
- The `ResourceBuilding` only generates resources via `productionRate` — no input/output recipes.
- No recipe data structure.
- No crafting queue or timed production.

#### ❌ **No Decoration Mode**
- `BuildingType.Decoration` and `BuildingType.Special` exist in the enum but have no special behavior.
- No decoration-specific placement rules.

#### ❌ **No Undo / Cancel During Placement**
- No escape-key-to-cancel during placement mode.
- No confirm/cancel buttons during placement.

#### ❌ **Limited Interaction System**
- `PortalBuilding` uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection.
- No `IPointerClickHandler`, no unified raycast target system, no layer-based click filtering.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot` also uses `OnMouseDown` — this pattern is consistent but limited.

#### ❌ **No Prefabs for Buildings**
- All 5 `BuildingData` assets have `prefab: {fileID: 0}` (null). They create placeholder colored sprites via `CreatePlaceholderBuilding()` instead.

#### ❌ **No Visual Feedback During Placement**
- No grid highlight.
- No building footprint outline.
- No valid/invalid placement tinting.
- No range circle preview (exists in TD's `TowerSlot.SelectSlot()` → `Tower.ShowRange()` but not in HomeBase).

---

### 4. What CAN Be Reused from TD Module

| TD Feature | Can Be Adapted? |
|------------|----------------|
| `TowerSlot.OnMouseDown` + `Physics2D.Raycast` | Yes — basic click detection pattern |
| `TowerSelectPanel` (UI for building selection) | Yes — the button grid + price display + gold-check pattern |
| `BuildButtonManager` (dynamic UI at slot position) | Yes — world-to-screen positioning of build UI |
| `ObjectPool` | Yes — for pooling building ghosts and effects |
| `TowerSlot._highlight` toggle | Yes — highlight hovered cells |
| `Tower.ShowRange()` / `HideRange()` | Yes — range visualization during placement |

---

### 5. Summary of Architectural Gaps by Priority

**Critical for "Portia-style" free placement:**
1. **Grid system** — a `GridManager` that defines cells, provides snap positions, and tracks occupancy
2. **Drag-and-placement system** — ghost prefab following cursor, click to confirm, escape to cancel
3. **Placement validation** — overlap detection, boundary checks, collision with other buildings
4. **Build mode state machine** — idle → selecting → ghosting → confirming → placing

**Important:**
5. **Rotation support** — 90° snap rotation with ghost preview
6. **Building relocation** — pick up and drag existing buildings
7. **Multi-tile occupancy** — use `BuildingData.gridSize` for 2x2, 2x3 buildings

**Nice-to-have for Portia-like depth:**
8. **Crafting/recipe system** — buildings that consume inputs and produce outputs over time
9. **Decoration system** — free-form decor placement without grid snapping
10. **Undo/cancel during placement** — escape to cancel, visual confirmation

The **foundation is solid** — the class hierarchy (BuildingBase → ResourceBuilding, PortalBuilding), save/load system, PlayerProfile integration, and module lifecycle are all well-structured. What's missing is the entire **interactive placement layer** that makes Portia-style building feel fluid and tactile.

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire

```

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

---

## Complete HomeBase Module Analysis

### 1. Architecture Overview

**Namespace**: `Sttop5.Modules.HomeBase`  
**Scene**: `Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/Scenes/HomeScene.scene`  
**Module Pattern**: Inherits from `GameModule` (abstract base in `_Shared/Core/GameModule.cs`), registered with `ModuleManager` for lifecycle management.

The HomeBase module is a **beginnings-only skeleton** — it has a solid foundation of class hierarchy, save/load, and core loops, but is **missing almost every feature needed for "My Time at Portia" free-style building and placement.**

---

### 2. Existing Code — What IS Built

#### Files Found (10 .cs files, all read in full):

| File | What it does |
|------|-------------|
| `BuildingBase.cs` | **Base class** for all buildings. Manages level, upgrade (gold cost check via `PlayerProfile`), demolish (60% refund), initialization, and save restoration. Calls virtual `BuildingUpdate()` in `Update()`. Has a two-frame delayed `_isPlaced` auto-set. |
| `BuildingData.cs` | **ScriptableObject** defining buildings. Fields: `buildingId`, `buildingName`, `description`, `BuildingType` enum, `icon`, `prefab`, `gridSize` (Vector2Int), `levels[]` (upgradeCost, buildCost, productionRate, productionCapacity, storageCapacity), portal target info, producedResource. |
| `BuildingManager.cs` | **Central building registry**. Has: `PlaceBuilding()` (instantiates prefab or creates placeholder, deducts gold), `RemoveBuilding()`, `GetBuildingNear()`, `ExportSaveData()`, `RestoreFromSaveData()`. Holds a `List<BuildingBase>` and a `_availableBuildings[]` array. |
| `PortalBuilding.cs` | **Portal subclass** — pulses scale/color, has `OnPortalClicked()` that calls `SceneManager.LoadScene()`, uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection. |
| `PortalEffectController.cs` | Simple light pulsing effect for portal buildings. |
| `HomeManager.cs` | **Module controller**. Extends `GameModule`. Initializes home, places starter buildings, handles save/load via `HomeSaveData`, implements `GetModuleSaveData()` / `RestoreModuleSaveData()`, saves on pause/quit. |
| `ResourceBuilding.cs` | **Resource production subclass**. `BuildingUpdate()` accumulates production based on `productionRate`/`productionCapacity`. `CollectResources()` adds Gold or Diamond to `PlayerProfile`. Has offline earnings calculation. |
| `ResourceManager.cs` | **Local resource manager** (Wood/Stone/Food). Has add/spend methods, `CollectAllResources()` (iterates all buildings), save/load via `HomeSaveData`. |
| `ResourceType.cs` | Enum: `Gold, Diamond, Wood, Stone, Food` |
| `HomeMainUI.cs` | **UI controller**. Displays Gold, Diamond, Level, Wood, Stone, Food. Has Collect All button, Build Menu toggle, Back button. Subscribes to `PlayerProfile` events. |

#### Existing ScriptableObject Assets (5 found):
- `GoldMine.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Gold, 3 levels (costs 100/200/500 gold to upgrade), gridSize (2,2)
- `LumberMill.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Wood, 3 levels, gridSize (2,2)
- `Quarry.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Fountain.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Portal_TowerDefense.asset` — BuildingType.Portal, targets "towerdefense" module → "MainMenu" scene, 1 level, gridSize (2,3)
- `Portal_Match3.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)

#### Save System:
- `HomeSaveData` class in `BuildingManager.cs` — serializes wood/stone/food counts + list of `BuildingSaveEntry` (buildingId, posX, posY, level)
- Save/load flows through `HomeManager` → `SaveSystem` (shared singleton that reads/writes JSON to `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/gamesave.json`)
- `GameSaveData` supports module-scoped save entries (ModuleSaveEntry list)

#### Shared Systems Available:
- `EventBus` / `GlobalEventBus` — typed event pub/sub
- `PlayerProfile` — singleton for Gold/Diamond/Level/Exp/Stamina
- `ModuleManager` — scene-loading-based module activation/deactivation
- `SceneLoader` — additive scene loading/unloading
- `Singleton<T>` — base singleton pattern (DontDestroyOnLoad)

---

### 3. What's MISSING for a "My Time at Portia" Free Building & Placement System

This is the critical part. The existing system is **slot/click-then-instantiate** — nothing like free-form placement:

#### ❌ **No Grid System**
- `BuildingData` has a `gridSize` field (Vector2Int), but **there is no Grid class, no GridManager, no snap-to-grid logic, no grid visualization** anywhere.
- `BuildingManager.PlaceBuilding()` just takes a raw worldPos — no snapping.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot.cs` uses pre-placed collider slots (mouse click + raycast), not a grid.

#### ❌ **No Drag-and-Drop / Ghost Preview**
- No prefab ghost/cursor following the mouse during placement.
- No rotation preview, no placement validation feedback (green/red indicator), no area-of-effect range preview.
- No `IDragHandler` / `IBeginDragHandler` / `IEndDragHandler` anywhere in the system.
- The `TowerPlacementTest.cs` (TD module) is the closest thing — it uses `Input.GetMouseButtonDown(0)` + `Physics2D.Raycast` to detect click on a collider, then calls `slot.PlaceTower()`. This is **not free placement**.

#### ❌ **No Placement Validation**
- No collision detection against other buildings.
- No terrain/boundary checking.
- No overlap prevention.
- No height/slope checks.
- No minimum-distance-from-other-buildings enforcement.

#### ❌ **No Build Menu with Drag-to-Place**
- `HomeMainUI` has a `_buildMenuPanel` toggle and calls `_homeManager?.OnCollectAllClicked()`.
- There is a `BuildButtonManager` in the TD module that spawns UI buttons at world-to-screen positions — but this is for clicking pre-existing slots, not for selecting from a build menu and then placing.
- No build-mode state machine (e.g., idle → placing → confirming → idle).

#### ❌ **No Free Rotation**
- No rotation input handling, no 45/90-degree snapping.
- `BuildingData` has no rotation-related fields.

#### ❌ **No Multi-Tile / Multi-Cell Occupancy System**
- `gridSize` exists on `BuildingData` but is never used in any logic.
- No system to track which cells are occupied.

#### ❌ **No Move/Relocate Building**
- No drag-to-move existing buildings.
- No "pick up and reposition" mechanic.

#### ❌ **No Crafting / Recipe System**
- The `ResourceBuilding` only generates resources via `productionRate` — no input/output recipes.
- No recipe data structure.
- No crafting queue or timed production.

#### ❌ **No Decoration Mode**
- `BuildingType.Decoration` and `BuildingType.Special` exist in the enum but have no special behavior.
- No decoration-specific placement rules.

#### ❌ **No Undo / Cancel During Placement**
- No escape-key-to-cancel during placement mode.
- No confirm/cancel buttons during placement.

#### ❌ **Limited Interaction System**
- `PortalBuilding` uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection.
- No `IPointerClickHandler`, no unified raycast target system, no layer-based click filtering.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot` also uses `OnMouseDown` — this pattern is consistent but limited.

#### ❌ **No Prefabs for Buildings**
- All 5 `BuildingData` assets have `prefab: {fileID: 0}` (null). They create placeholder colored sprites via `CreatePlaceholderBuilding()` instead.

#### ❌ **No Visual Feedback During Placement**
- No grid highlight.
- No building footprint outline.
- No valid/invalid placement tinting.
- No range circle preview (exists in TD's `TowerSlot.SelectSlot()` → `Tower.ShowRange()` but not in HomeBase).

---

### 4. What CAN Be Reused from TD Module

| TD Feature | Can Be Adapted? |
|------------|----------------|
| `TowerSlot.OnMouseDown` + `Physics2D.Raycast` | Yes — basic click detection pattern |
| `TowerSelectPanel` (UI for building selection) | Yes — the button grid + price display + gold-check pattern |
| `BuildButtonManager` (dynamic UI at slot position) | Yes — world-to-screen positioning of build UI |
| `ObjectPool` | Yes — for pooling building ghosts and effects |
| `TowerSlot._highlight` toggle | Yes — highlight hovered cells |
| `Tower.ShowRange()` / `HideRange()` | Yes — range visualization during placement |

---

### 5. Summary of Architectural Gaps by Priority

**Critical for "Portia-style" free placement:**
1. **Grid system** — a `GridManager` that defines cells, provides snap positions, and tracks occupancy
2. **Drag-and-placement system** — ghost prefab following cursor, click to confirm, escape to cancel
3. **Placement validation** — overlap detection, boundary checks, collision with other buildings
4. **Build mode state machine** — idle → selecting → ghosting → confirming → placing

**Important:**
5. **Rotation support** — 90° snap rotation with ghost preview
6. **Building relocation** — pick up and drag existing buildings
7. **Multi-tile occupancy** — use `BuildingData.gridSize` for 2x2, 2x3 buildings

**Nice-to-have for Portia-like depth:**
8. **Crafting/recipe system** — buildings that consume inputs and produce outputs over time
9. **Decoration system** — free-form decor placement without grid snapping
10. **Undo/cancel during placement** — escape to cancel, visual confirmation

The **foundation is solid** — the class hierarchy (BuildingBase → ResourceBuilding, PortalBuilding), save/load system, PlayerProfile integration, and module lifecycle are all well-structured. What's missing is the entire **interactive placement layer** that makes Portia-style building feel fluid and tactile.

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

functionDeclarations.name: run_shell_command
functionDeclarations.description:
This tool executes a given shell command using the best available Windows shell (PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt).

IMPORTANT:
- This tool is for terminal operations (e.g., git / npm / docker / build & test commands).
- DO NOT use this tool for file operations like reading, writing, editing, or searching files. Prefer the dedicated file tools for those actions.
- Quote any file path that contains spaces with double quotes, e.g. `cd "/path with spaces"` or `python "/path with spaces/script.py"`.
- If a command would produce very large output, prefer adding flags/filters (narrow paths, limit counts, request specific fields, machine-readable formats like JSON) to keep output small and unambiguous.
- Very large outputs may be returned as the most recent tail of the output. Earlier content may be truncated from the beginning. If the tool reports a "Full output saved to: <path>", that file contains the full command output. Use the exact path returned by the tool, then prefer searching that file first (grep/rg or platform equivalents) for specific ERROR/WARN/FAIL/SUCCESS markers, then reading small slices (with `read_file` using `offset`/`limit`) or tailing the log file instead of re-running expensive commands.
- Do not append truncating pipelines such as `| tail`, `| Select-Object -Last`, or similar to an expensive first run just to suppress output. Those discard earlier context and force a re-run if you later need omitted lines. Let the tool/log capture the full output, then inspect the saved log file.
- When issuing multiple shell commands in one response, parallelize only when they are truly independent and do not compete for the same files, directories, logs, locks, caches, git state, or ports. If one command depends on another or shared state may race, run them sequentially.

The following information is returned:
- Command: Executed command.
- Directory: Directory where command was executed, or `(root)`.
- Output: Combined command output (stdout/stderr). Can be `(empty)` or an excerpt if very large.
- Error: Error or `(none)` if no error was reported for the subprocess.
- Exit Code: Exit code or `(none)` if terminated by signal.
- Signal: Signal number or `(none)` if no signal was received.

command.description: Exact command to execute using the best available Windows shell (automatically selected from PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt). Quote any file paths containing spaces with double quotes.

description.description: Brief description of the command for the user. Be specific and concise. Ideally a single sentence. Can be up to 3 sentences for clarity. No line breaks.

directory.description: (OPTIONAL) The absolute path of the directory to run the command in. If not provided, the project root directory is used. Must be a directory within the workspace and must already exist.

run_in_background.description: Set to true to run this command in the background. Returns immediately with task metadata and an output file path.

functionDeclarations.name: search_file_content
functionDeclarations.description: Searches for a regular expression pattern within the content of files in a specified directory, a specific file, or the current working directory. Can filter files by a glob pattern when searching directories. Returns the lines containing matches, along with their file paths and line numbers.

pattern.description: The regular expression (regex) pattern to search for within file contents (e.g., 'function\s+myFunction', 'import\s+\{.*\}\s+from\s+.*').

path.description: Optional: The absolute path to a directory or file to search within. If a file path is provided, searches only within that file. If a directory path is provided, searches all files in that directory. If omitted, searches the current working directory.

include.description: Optional: A glob pattern to filter which files are searched (e.g., '*.js', '*.{ts,tsx}', 'src/**'). Only applicable when searching directories, ignored for file searches. If omitted, searches all files (respecting potential global ignores).

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of matches to return to prevent context overflow (default: 20, max: 150). Values above 150 are clamped automatically. Use lower values for broad searches, higher for specific searches.

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |

| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## Complete HomeBase Module Analysis

### 1. Architecture Overview

**Namespace**: `Sttop5.Modules.HomeBase`  
**Scene**: `Assets/_Modules/HomeBase/Scenes/HomeScene.scene`  
**Module Pattern**: Inherits from `GameModule` (abstract base in `_Shared/Core/GameModule.cs`), registered with `ModuleManager` for lifecycle management.

The HomeBase module is a **beginnings-only skeleton** — it has a solid foundation of class hierarchy, save/load, and core loops, but is **missing almost every feature needed for "My Time at Portia" free-style building and placement.**

---

### 2. Existing Code — What IS Built

#### Files Found (10 .cs files, all read in full):

| File | What it does |
|------|-------------|
| `BuildingBase.cs` | **Base class** for all buildings. Manages level, upgrade (gold cost check via `PlayerProfile`), demolish (60% refund), initialization, and save restoration. Calls virtual `BuildingUpdate()` in `Update()`. Has a two-frame delayed `_isPlaced` auto-set. |
| `BuildingData.cs` | **ScriptableObject** defining buildings. Fields: `buildingId`, `buildingName`, `description`, `BuildingType` enum, `icon`, `prefab`, `gridSize` (Vector2Int), `levels[]` (upgradeCost, buildCost, productionRate, productionCapacity, storageCapacity), portal target info, producedResource. |
| `BuildingManager.cs` | **Central building registry**. Has: `PlaceBuilding()` (instantiates prefab or creates placeholder, deducts gold), `RemoveBuilding()`, `GetBuildingNear()`, `ExportSaveData()`, `RestoreFromSaveData()`. Holds a `List<BuildingBase>` and a `_availableBuildings[]` array. |
| `PortalBuilding.cs` | **Portal subclass** — pulses scale/color, has `OnPortalClicked()` that calls `SceneManager.LoadScene()`, uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection. |
| `PortalEffectController.cs` | Simple light pulsing effect for portal buildings. |
| `HomeManager.cs` | **Module controller**. Extends `GameModule`. Initializes home, places starter buildings, handles save/load via `HomeSaveData`, implements `GetModuleSaveData()` / `RestoreModuleSaveData()`, saves on pause/quit. |
| `ResourceBuilding.cs` | **Resource production subclass**. `BuildingUpdate()` accumulates production based on `productionRate`/`productionCapacity`. `CollectResources()` adds Gold or Diamond to `PlayerProfile`. Has offline earnings calculation. |
| `ResourceManager.cs` | **Local resource manager** (Wood/Stone/Food). Has add/spend methods, `CollectAllResources()` (iterates all buildings), save/load via `HomeSaveData`. |
| `ResourceType.cs` | Enum: `Gold, Diamond, Wood, Stone, Food` |
| `HomeMainUI.cs` | **UI controller**. Displays Gold, Diamond, Level, Wood, Stone, Food. Has Collect All button, Build Menu toggle, Back button. Subscribes to `PlayerProfile` events. |

#### Existing ScriptableObject Assets (5 found):
- `GoldMine.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Gold, 3 levels (costs 100/200/500 gold to upgrade), gridSize (2,2)
- `LumberMill.asset` — BuildingType.ResourceGen, produces Wood, 3 levels, gridSize (2,2)
- `Quarry.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Fountain.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)
- `Portal_TowerDefense.asset` — BuildingType.Portal, targets "towerdefense" module → "MainMenu" scene, 1 level, gridSize (2,3)
- `Portal_Match3.asset` — (exists, not read but confirmed)

#### Save System:
- `HomeSaveData` class in `BuildingManager.cs` — serializes wood/stone/food counts + list of `BuildingSaveEntry` (buildingId, posX, posY, level)
- Save/load flows through `HomeManager` → `SaveSystem` (shared singleton that reads/writes JSON to `Application.persistentDataPath/Save/gamesave.json`)
- `GameSaveData` supports module-scoped save entries (ModuleSaveEntry list)

#### Shared Systems Available:
- `EventBus` / `GlobalEventBus` — typed event pub/sub
- `PlayerProfile` — singleton for Gold/Diamond/Level/Exp/Stamina
- `ModuleManager` — scene-loading-based module activation/deactivation
- `SceneLoader` — additive scene loading/unloading
- `Singleton<T>` — base singleton pattern (DontDestroyOnLoad)

---

### 3. What's MISSING for a "My Time at Portia" Free Building & Placement System

This is the critical part. The existing system is **slot/click-then-instantiate** — nothing like free-form placement:

#### ❌ **No Grid System**
- `BuildingData` has a `gridSize` field (Vector2Int), but **there is no Grid class, no GridManager, no snap-to-grid logic, no grid visualization** anywhere.
- `BuildingManager.PlaceBuilding()` just takes a raw worldPos — no snapping.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot.cs` uses pre-placed collider slots (mouse click + raycast), not a grid.

#### ❌ **No Drag-and-Drop / Ghost Preview**
- No prefab ghost/cursor following the mouse during placement.
- No rotation preview, no placement validation feedback (green/red indicator), no area-of-effect range preview.
- No `IDragHandler` / `IBeginDragHandler` / `IEndDragHandler` anywhere in the system.
- The `TowerPlacementTest.cs` (TD module) is the closest thing — it uses `Input.GetMouseButtonDown(0)` + `Physics2D.Raycast` to detect click on a collider, then calls `slot.PlaceTower()`. This is **not free placement**.

#### ❌ **No Placement Validation**
- No collision detection against other buildings.
- No terrain/boundary checking.
- No overlap prevention.
- No height/slope checks.
- No minimum-distance-from-other-buildings enforcement.

#### ❌ **No Build Menu with Drag-to-Place**
- `HomeMainUI` has a `_buildMenuPanel` toggle and calls `_homeManager?.OnCollectAllClicked()`.
- There is a `BuildButtonManager` in the TD module that spawns UI buttons at world-to-screen positions — but this is for clicking pre-existing slots, not for selecting from a build menu and then placing.
- No build-mode state machine (e.g., idle → placing → confirming → idle).

#### ❌ **No Free Rotation**
- No rotation input handling, no 45/90-degree snapping.
- `BuildingData` has no rotation-related fields.

#### ❌ **No Multi-Tile / Multi-Cell Occupancy System**
- `gridSize` exists on `BuildingData` but is never used in any logic.
- No system to track which cells are occupied.

#### ❌ **No Move/Relocate Building**
- No drag-to-move existing buildings.
- No "pick up and reposition" mechanic.

#### ❌ **No Crafting / Recipe System**
- The `ResourceBuilding` only generates resources via `productionRate` — no input/output recipes.
- No recipe data structure.
- No crafting queue or timed production.

#### ❌ **No Decoration Mode**
- `BuildingType.Decoration` and `BuildingType.Special` exist in the enum but have no special behavior.
- No decoration-specific placement rules.

#### ❌ **No Undo / Cancel During Placement**
- No escape-key-to-cancel during placement mode.
- No confirm/cancel buttons during placement.

#### ❌ **Limited Interaction System**
- `PortalBuilding` uses `OnMouseDown` for click detection.
- No `IPointerClickHandler`, no unified raycast target system, no layer-based click filtering.
- The TD module's `TowerSlot` also uses `OnMouseDown` — this pattern is consistent but limited.

#### ❌ **No Prefabs for Buildings**
- All 5 `BuildingData` assets have `prefab: {fileID: 0}` (null). They create placeholder colored sprites via `CreatePlaceholderBuilding()` instead.

#### ❌ **No Visual Feedback During Placement**
- No grid highlight.
- No building footprint outline.
- No valid/invalid placement tinting.
- No range circle preview (exists in TD's `TowerSlot.SelectSlot()` → `Tower.ShowRange()` but not in HomeBase).

---

### 4. What CAN Be Reused from TD Module

| TD Feature | Can Be Adapted? |
|------------|----------------|
| `TowerSlot.OnMouseDown` + `Physics2D.Raycast` | Yes — basic click detection pattern |
| `TowerSelectPanel` (UI for building selection) | Yes — the button grid + price display + gold-check pattern |
| `BuildButtonManager` (dynamic UI at slot position) | Yes — world-to-screen positioning of build UI |
| `ObjectPool` | Yes — for pooling building ghosts and effects |
| `TowerSlot._highlight` toggle | Yes — highlight hovered cells |
| `Tower.ShowRange()` / `HideRange()` | Yes — range visualization during placement |

---

### 5. Summary of Architectural Gaps by Priority

**Critical for "Portia-style" free placement:**
1. **Grid system** — a `GridManager` that defines cells, provides snap positions, and tracks occupancy
2. **Drag-and-placement system** — ghost prefab following cursor, click to confirm, escape to cancel
3. **Placement validation** — overlap detection, boundary checks, collision with other buildings
4. **Build mode state machine** — idle → selecting → ghosting → confirming → placing

**Important:**
5. **Rotation support** — 90° snap rotation with ghost preview
6. **Building relocation** — pick up and drag existing buildings
7. **Multi-tile occupancy** — use `BuildingData.gridSize` for 2x2, 2x3 buildings

**Nice-to-have for Portia-like depth:**
8. **Crafting/recipe system** — buildings that consume inputs and produce outputs over time
9. **Decoration system** — free-form decor placement without grid snapping
10. **Undo/cancel during placement** — escape to cancel, visual confirmation

The **foundation is solid** — the class hierarchy (BuildingBase → ResourceBuilding, PortalBuilding), save/load system, PlayerProfile integration, and module lifecycle are all well-structured. What's missing is the entire **interactive placement layer** that makes Portia-style building feel fluid and tactile.
